category_sources: Official InfluxDB 3 docs describe InfluxDB as the current generation for time series workloads.
source_facts.description says it is a time series, events, and metrics database.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is influxdb and source_facts.homepage is the official InfluxDB product page.
docs_sources: Official InfluxData documentation domain has an InfluxDB 3 documentation landing page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/influxdata/influxdb; per instruction, repo returned as null and not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies time series, events, and metrics database functionality.
source_facts.executables lists influxdb3 as a CLI executable.
